# altitude

**Instance Property**

The altitude of the map.

## Declaration

```swift
var altitude: CLLocationDistance { get }
```

## Pinpointing the Map

- **mapType**: The type of map in the project.
- **centerCoordinate**: The coordinates of the center of the map.
- **heading**: The heading of the map.
- **pitch**: The pitch of the map.
- **annotations**: An array of optional annotations attached to the map.
